name: refmark-apply-ref-diff
description: Expose the refmark apply_ref_diff primitive through MCP for stable same-file multi-edit workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Apply region-scoped refmark edits through MCP
interface.longDescription: Bring the refmark apply_ref_diff primitive into Codex through MCP so agents can target stable semantic regions or explicit ref ranges when making multiple same-file edits.
defaultPrompt: Use apply_ref_diff to update several Python or TypeScript regions in one pass
